title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to set up and use Claude Code for free with Ollama to build agentic AI applications. The guide covers installing Ollama, selecting LLMs like Qwen 3.5, and creating a full-stack travel agency AI app with Python Flask backend and HTML/CSS frontend using multiple AI agents.
